title: The Export (Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963
full_text: The Export (Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963 निर्यात (क्‍वालिटी नियंत्रण और निरीक्षण) अधिनियम, 1963 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196322 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 1963-08-24 Act Year: 1963 Short Title: The Export (Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963 Hindi Title: निर्यात (क्‍वालिटी नियंत्रण और निरीक्षण) अधिनियम, 1963 Long Title: An Act to provide for the sound development of the export trade of India through quality control and inspection and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 01-01-1964 Notification: 1st January, 1964, vide notification No. S.O. 3604(E), dated the 30th December, 1963, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Export (Quality Control and Inspection) Act, 1963 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Export Inspection Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Director of Inspection and Quality Control. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Functions of the Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Powers of the Central Government in regard to quality control and inspection. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Machinery for quality control and inspection. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Power to recognise or establish marks to denote conformity with standard specifications. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Power to obtain information from exporters, etc. Section 10. Finance, accounts and audit. Section 10A. Power to enter and inspect. Section 10B. Power to search. Section 10C. Power to seize commodities, etc. Section 10D. Power to stop and seize conveyances. Section 10E. Search and seizure to be made in accordance with the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973. Section 10F. Confiscation. Section 10G. Confiscation of conveyance. Section 10H. Option to pay fine in lieu of confiscation. Section 10I. Liability to penalty. Section 10J. Confiscation or penalty not to interfere with other punishments. Section 10K. Adjudication. Section 10L. Giving of opportunity to the owner of goods etc. Section 10M. Appeal Section 10N. Powers of revision. Section 10O. Powers of adjudicating and other authorities. Section 10P. Continuance of proceedings in the event of death or insolvency Section 11. Penalty Section 11A. Penalty for contravention of order made by adjudicating authority or Appellate authority. Section 11B. Offences by officers and employees of agency, etc. Section 11C. Correction of clerical or arithmetical mistakes. Section 12. Offences by companies. Section 13. Delegation of powers. Section 14. Procedure for prosecution. Section 15. Officers and employees of agency to be public servants. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 16A. Suspension, etc., of operation of the provisions of the Act. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 18. Act to over-ride other enactments.
